articles.title: Nvidia Stock Trades Flat Despite $1 Trillion Sales Target as ‘Market Expects Nvidia to Keep Beating Expectations’

articles.title: Goldman pumps up its S&P 500 price target to 8,000 for the year as it eyes an earnings-fueled rally
articles.summary: Goldman Sachs says an earnings-fueled rally will lift the S&P 500 to 8,000 by year-end, with full year EPS growth for the index clocking in at 24%.
articles.text_to_analyze: Goldman pumps up its S&P 500 price target to 8,000 for the year as it eyes an earnings-fueled rally. Goldman Sachs says an earnings-fueled rally will lift the S&P 500 to 8,000 by year-end, with full year EPS growth for the index clocking in at 24%.
